name: Dance Princess of the Ice Barrier
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>氷</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ひょう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>結</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>けっ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>界</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>かい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>舞</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>まい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>姫</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ひめ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: Once per turn, if you control another "Ice Barrier" monster: You can reveal any number of "Ice Barrier" monsters in your hand, then target an equal number of Set Spells/Traps your opponent controls; return those targets to the hand.
mnst_eff: Once per turn, if you control another "Ice Barrier" monster: You can reveal any number of "Ice Barrier" monsters in your hand, then target an equal number of Set Spells/Traps your opponent controls; return those targets to the hand.
eff: Once per turn, if you control another "Ice Barrier" monster: You can reveal any number of "Ice Barrier" monsters in your hand, then target an equal number of Set Spells/Traps your opponent controls; return those targets to the hand.

action: Returns from your opponent's field to your opponent's hand
